creator: h2+fbsdports@fsfe.org
text:
> I updated patches.

Thanks!

> Particularly, USE_GCC isn't needed.

Because base compiler and most others are now c++14 safe?

> AVX2/ARCH_AVX512_xxx should be added too.

Sure, I can do that.

Should the options be named as the extension? I noticed you renamed it from OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS. Doesn't that mean that people who have a custom make.conf with OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS set don't get the optimizations by default? But maybe they would have SSE4 set then, as well. (I have been using only packages for years now)

Actually, I thought about making the SSE4 option on by default since I guess >90% of amd64 platforms have SSE4 nowadays, or not? Or would flavors make sense here?
